---
title: "References"
bibliography: 
    - ref_optimal_control.bib
    - ref_robust_control.bib
csl: ieee-control-systems.csl
format:
    html:
        html-math-method: katex
        code-fold: true
        code-summary: "Show the code"
crossref:
  fig-prefix: Fig. 
  eq-prefix: Eq.
engine: julia
---

Control design for systems with *structured uncertainties* relies on the concept of a *structured singular value* (SSU, mu, $\mu$), hence the name $\mu$ synthesis. It is covered in [@skogestadMultivariableFeedbackControl2005, Section 8.12]. 

The $\mathcal H_\infty$ optimization-based loop-shaping method is thoroughly explained in [@skogestadMultivariableFeedbackControl2005, Section 9.3.6]. It also contains a detailed discussion of an extension to the 2DOF case, implementation in the observer-state-feedback form, and some sort of antiwindup technique called *self-conditioning*.
